author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .py files as a read-only source and structure view with symbols, search, and parse diagnostics. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Open .py files as a read-only source and structure view with symbols, search, and parse diagnostics.

name: Python Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description: Initial release of Python Viewer for Obsidian.\n\nIncludes source and structure views for .py files, read-only rendering, diagnostics, copy actions, and manual installation assets.
